args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' ORDER BY createddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' ORDER BY createddate;

args.query:
SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, COUNT(ch.id) as assign_count, array_agg(ch.newvalue__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assigned_agents
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, COUNT(ch.id) as assign_count, array_agg(ch.newvalue__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assigned_agents
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate;

args.query:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;

args.query:
WITH case_assigns AS (
 SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate::timestamp as createddate, c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate,
 COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as assign_count,
 MIN(ch.newvalue__c) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as assigned_agent
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
 WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
 GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
agent_totals AS (
 SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as total_assignments
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
 WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02' AND ch.field__c='Owner Assignment'
 GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
),
case_durations AS (
 SELECT ca.case_id, ca.assigned_agent, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ca.closeddate - ca.createddate))/60.0 as duration_minutes
 FROM case_assigns ca
 WHERE ca.assign_count = 1
)
SELECT at.agent_id, AVG(cd.duration_minutes) as avg_handle_minutes, COUNT(cd.case_id) as cases_included, at.total_assignments
FROM agent_totals at
JOIN case_durations cd ON cd.assigned_agent = at.agent_id
GROUP BY at.agent_id, at.total_assignments
HAVING at.total_assignments > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_minutes ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assigns AS (
 SELECT c.id as case_id, c.createddate::timestamp as createddate, c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate,
 COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as assign_count,
 MIN(ch.newvalue__c) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') as assigned_agent
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
 WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
 GROUP BY c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate
),
agent_totals AS (
 SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as total_assignments
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
 WHERE c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02' AND ch.field__c='Owner Assignment'
 GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
),
case_durations AS (
 SELECT ca.case_id, ca.assigned_agent, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ca.closeddate - ca.createddate))/60.0 as duration_minutes
 FROM case_assigns ca
 WHERE ca.assign_count = 1
)
SELECT at.agent_id, AVG(cd.duration_minutes) as avg_handle_minutes, COUNT(cd.case_id) as cases_included, at.total_assignments
FROM agent_totals at
JOIN case_durations cd ON cd.assigned_agent = at.agent_id
GROUP BY at.agent_id, at.total_assignments
HAVING at.total_assignments > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_minutes ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "No agent handled more than one case in the past four months (2023-05-02 to 2023-09-02), so no agent meets the >1-case criterion."
